source_jobs.title: 🎨 Graphic Designer
source_jobs.description:
Partiful's mission is to cultivate friendships through social events.

We believe events are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE




WHAT YOU’LL DO 💪

 - Design visually compelling, delightful graphics for our product and marketing assets

 - Ideate and create posters for our event image library — designing the “face” of people’s parties

 - Partner with Product Designers to shape the visual storytelling of our product

 - Partner with Marketing to communicate and deliver our product to the world - from new feature launches to ~vibes~

 - Communicate complex concepts through simple and delightful graphics

 - Maintain and contribute to our library of graphic elements that visualize the Partiful brand


WHAT YOU’LL BRING 🫡

 - 2–3 years of experience designing product and marketing graphics, ideally at a startup or in consumer social

 - A portfolio that shows clear thinking, strong visuals, and clarity in communication

 - Ability to create visuals on the fly: you’re able to quickly come up with ideas that reflect our brand, and just as quickly bring them to life through stunning graphics

 - Experience working on multiple projects at the same time

 - Strong grasp of visual hierarchy, layout, and typography - an eye for quality and polish

 - A collaborative mindset — you work well with others, leave ego at the door, and give and receive feedback with care

 - Strong sense for product as well as visual design -- you consider usability, user flow, and context alongside aesthetics


BONUS POINTS 🫨

Not required, but let us know if you have experience with:

 - Motion design or microanimations (Lottie, Rive, pure CSS)

 - Blender/Spline

source_jobs.title: Opportunistic Application

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was also recently named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded twice in 3 months).



If you'd like to work with us but don't see a good fit on our jobs page, you can drop your resume here!

You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.



The Role

We’re looking for an experienced, thoughtful principal/staff engineer to help bring this vision to life. This is primarily an IC role with a strong mentorship component; if you're looking for a pure Engineering Manager role, this isn't the best fit. We're NY- and LA-based with a hybrid in-person model, in the office 3 days a week. Our stack is React (web app), React Native (mobile app), Node.js http://node.js/, and Typescript.

In this role, you'll:

 - Work directly with the CTO

 - Make key technical decisions across the stack

 - Be responsible for crafting scalable architecture

 - Ensure a high degree of code quality

 - Implement engineering best practices

 - Guide/mentor other engineers

 - Lead and improve engineering processes

 - Own development of end-to-end features and projects

You’re likely a good fit if you:

 - Have 12+ years of full-time software engineering experience, with at least 3 recent years working in React

 - Worked at both startups and larger companies, staying long enough to see the impact of your technical decisions

 - Have strong product chops

 - Are deeply committed to high-quality, sustainable, and scalable engineering

 - Can elegantly structure and decomp complex features

 - Are comfortable with ambiguity

 - Generate quick yet thoughtful solutions when faced with constraints

 - Put ego aside when making decisions

 - Practice leading without authority

 - Are passionate about growing and teaching others

What we offer:

 - 401(k) with up to 6% matching

 - Comprehens

source_jobs.title: 🔮 Product Engineer (Full Stack)

We're looking for thoughtful, hardworking, creative engineers who thrive in a fast-paced, high-ownership environment. We're NY- and LA-based with a hybrid in-person model (in the office 3 days a week). Our stack is React (web app), React Native (mobile app), Node.js http://node.js/, and Typescript.

 - Own all aspects of technical implementation: backend, frontend, web, mobile

 - Help prioritize features and projects based on data, user feedback, and company goals

 - Meet with users to get real product signal and feedback, and work closely with our designers to craft thoughtful UX/UI

 - Collaborate with our community team to understand how our product is being used

 - Take full ownership of large product areas as you grow

 - Help drive improvements in code quality, velocity, and engineering best practices

 - Mentor (and be mentored by) other high-performing engineers

 - Join an ambitious team that moves fast and loves what we build

In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

We're looking for a business-oriented data scientist to help us unlock the full value of our data, supercharge our growth, and guide our product roadmap. You'll work closely with leadership, product, and marketing to analyze key initiatives, define meaningful metrics, guide product decisions with insights, and empower the team to use data confidently. This role sits at the intersection of product analytics, decision science and data governance - providing insights critical to our trajectory, and building systems and culture that make data more accessible and actionable for everyone.

We're an NY- based team with a hybrid in-person model, in the office 3 days a week. Our data stack is Amplitude, Hex (SQL, Python), BiqQuery, DBT, and Javascript (not required).




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Make key data decisions across the company

 - Analyze large and complex datasets to derive actionable insights

 - Monitor performance trends and conduct diagnostic analyses

 - Collaborate closely the product team identify key benchmarks for new features, and analyze the performance of all aspects of the product

 - Provide data-driven recommendations and run experiments to support product development, user engagement strategies, and business growth

 - Own the data dictionary and support a culture of data literacy across teams

 - Build, improve and maintain data pipelines & the overall data foundation

 - Maintain the Amplitude taxonomy and ensure it’s reliable, documented, and intuitive

 - Identify and execute on opportunit

source_jobs.title: Business Operations Associate
source_jobs.description:
Partiful's mission is to cultivate friendships through social events.

We believe parties (and other social events) are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

As a Business Operations Associate, you'll play a key role in building and scaling Partiful's operations. You'll act as a connector and force multiplier across every team in the company - identifying inefficiencies, standing up solutions or building the systems that fix them, and finding ways to make everyone faster. This is a role for someone who sees AI as a first instinct, not a last resort; no two weeks will look the same.




IN THIS ROLE YOU WILL:

 - Be a core part of an innovative, AI-native team that serves as the backbone of the company and the swiss-army-knife of any problem that arises

 - Personally execute on high-priority projects across the business

 - Own vendor relationships end-to-end - sourcing, diligencing, negotiating, and implementing

 - Drive cost reduction across the business, identifying and actioning on opportunities in collaboration with Product, Design and Data Science

 - Support ticketing operations, helping build and scale the systems and processes that power Partiful's new ticketing business

 - Relentlessly identify painpoints, and streamline, automate and scale processes to make every team across the business better and more efficient, with a strong bias towards building & deploying AI wherever possible

 - Prototype solutions & build internal tools end-to-end using vibe coding

source_jobs.title: 🛠️ Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
PARTIFUL'S MISSION IS TO CULTIVATE FRIENDSHIPS THROUGH SOCIAL EVENTS.

We believe events are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

We’re looking for an experienced Platform Engineer to own and scale the systems that power our product and team. You’ll build and maintain the core infrastructure that powers Partiful's products and enables your teammates to move quickly, confidently, and securely — from CI/CD pipelines and observability tools to scalable backend architecture and cloud services.

This is a fast-paced, high-ownership role in an environment where we move quickly, set ambitious goals, and hold a high bar for speed and technical excellence. You’ll work closely with our product and platform teams to ensure reliability, performance, and developer velocity as we scale. Our stack is React (web app), React Native (mobile app), Node.js, and Typescript, running on GCP with a serverless architecture.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Design, build, and maintain scalable, secure infrastructure across GCP’s ecosystem (Cloud Functions, Firestore, Cloud Tasks, Redis, Pub/Sub, etc.)

 - Collaborate with other engineers to design performant APIs, databases, and backend systems

 - Improve reliability and observability across our stack (monitoring, alerting, logging, tracing)

 - Evolve our CI/CD pipelines and developer environments to maximize speed and confidence in shipping

 - Empower others (and yourself) to use AI tools effectively and safely across the development process

 - Own system performance, uptime, and scalability as usage grows

 - Implement security best practices, from secrets management to access control

 - Respond to and help prev

We’re looking for a Staff Platform Engineer to lead and scale the systems that power our product and engineering team. You’ll be the architect and driving force behind the reliability, scalability, and velocity of our platform — designing the infrastructure that powers products used by millions of users, and defining how our company builds and ships software at scale.

This is a high-impact, high-ownership role in an environment where we move quickly, set ambitious goals, and hold a high bar for speed and technical excellence. You’ll drive long-term architectural decisions, lead high-leverage initiatives across teams, and set the technical standards for how we operate as we scale rapidly. You’ll also play a key role in enabling engineers across the company to move faster while maintaining reliability and code quality.

Our stack is React (web app), React Native (mobile app), Node.js, and Typescript, running on GCP with a serverless architecture (Firestore, Redis, Cloud Run).




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Architect and evolve our cloud infrastructure across GCP’s serverless ecosystem (Cloud Run, Firestore, Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub, etc.) to support rapid growth in users and product use cases

 - Design fault-tolerant, high-throughput systems and ensure observability and performance are first-class citizens

 - Lead cross-functional initiatives that improve developer velocity, system performance, and scalability

 - Develop and oversee the CI/CD, release, and testing infrastructure that supports dozens of deployment

source_jobs.title: 📱 App Infrastructure (React Native) Engineer
source_jobs.description:
PARTIFUL'S MISSION IS TO CULTIVATE FRIENDSHIPS THROUGH SOCIAL EVENTS.

We believe events are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.



THE ROLE

We’re looking for an experienced App Infrastructure Engineer to own and scale the systems that power mobile development at Partiful. You'll build the foundation that enables our team to ship faster while maintaining world-class app performance and reliability. We believe all Partiful engineers should be able to contribute to our mobile apps, and you’ll make that possible by building infrastructure that scales with the company.

As our App Infrastructure Engineer, you'll be responsible for maintaining and evolving our Expo-based development environment, implementing cutting-edge React Native capabilities, and expanding Partiful's presence across iOS and Android surfaces. You'll work at the intersection of developer experience and user experience, ensuring our engineering team has the tools they need while our users get the responsive, native-feeling app they expect. Our mobile stack is React Native, Typescript, Expo, Expo Router (among many other Expo libraries), Reanimated, TanStack Query, Sentry.



WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Maintain and evolve our Expo infrastructure, ensuring smooth upgrades and optimal configuration as we scale

 - Leverage React Native's New Architecture and latest tooling (React Profiler, etc.) to identify and eliminate performance bottlenecks

 - Build and maintain iOS-specific features like App Clips https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=09NEBU5Xqfs, Live Activities, and Widgets to create seamless user experiences

 - Work with our close partners at Expo & Software Mansion, by testing out new fe

In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

We're always on the lookout for insanely talented Product Designers. Drop your resume and portfolio, and we'll reach out if it's a good fit!




WHAT YOU’LL DO 💪

 - Design and ship delightful product experiences across mobile and web

 - Partner with product engineers from early scoping to high-fidelity mocks

 - Rapidly prototype concepts in Figma and code to communicate ideas and generate excitement

 - Use data, user research, and design instinct to inform decisions and bring clarity to complex problems

 - Maintain a high bar for craft and polish across every feature you touch, with a sharp eye for inconsistencies in the broader product experience

 - Ship with speed and intention in a fast-paced environment, knowing when to move fast and when to slow down for the details that users notice and love


WHAT YOU’LL BRING 🫡

 - 2–7 years designing and shipping digital products, ideally at a startup or in consumer social

 - A portfolio of production-shipped work showcasing strong visual craft, cross-platform range, and sharp product intuition

 - Hands-on experience using AI tools to accelerate your workflow

 - A collaborative mindset - you work well with others, leave ego at the door, and give and receive feedback with care


BONUS POINTS 🫨

Not required, but let us know if you have experience with:

 - Motion design or microanimations (Lottie, Rive, pure CSS)

 - Prototyping

 - Storyboarding for animations and demo videos

 - UX writing or microcopy

 - Front-end development

 - Creating iconsets

 - D

source_jobs.title: Business Development, Ticketing
source_jobs.description:
Partiful's mission is to cultivate friendships through social events.

We believe parties (and other social events) are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google's Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple's App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple's App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

Partiful has launched the ability to buy and sell tickets within the platform, and we're hiring our first dedicated Business Development hire to own the mid-market segment and bring the best ticketed events across the world onto Partiful.

In this role, you’ll source, close, and launch new ticketing partners on Partiful. Critically, you’ll be solely focused on events that people actually want to go to - tasteful, culturally relevant events, where hosts and venues are focused on building loyal community. For example, music collectives, supper clubs, cultural institutions, festivals, independent venues and exclusive experiences.

You'll work directly with our Business Operations team and partner closely with support, marketing, and product.

If you love live events and want to help shape the next chapter of how people throw them, this is the role.




WHAT YOU'LL DO 💪

 - Source, qualify, and close premium hosts in your first year, targeting premium accounts

 - Build and manage a pipeline of inbound and outbound against our ICP

 - Partner with our support team to onboard new hosts through their first ticketed events

 - Work with marketing to develop assets to help scale the BD process

 - Maintain an extremely high bar for quality while driving platform Gross Ticket Value

 - Curate our events supply with intention and uphold quality standards

 - Develop a best in class, scalable business development engine leveraging applicable tech




WHAT YOU'LL BRING 🫡

 - 2–5 years in BD,

source_jobs.description:
Partiful's mission is to cultivate friendships through social events.

We believe parties (and other social events) are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google's Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple's App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple's App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

As Partiful’s first finance hire, you'll own Partiful's finance function end-to-end - building the systems, model, and operational infrastructure that enable Partiful’s growth, and help the business make fast, confident decisions at scale. This is a role for someone who wants to own the full picture and can execute on the granular, day-to-day finance operations - modeling scenarios that inform our most important decisions, managing our P&L, coordinating with our tax & accounting firm to ensure our numbers are trustworthy & timely, tracking & reporting financial KPIs, and collaborating with every team in the business to set us up for success.




IN THIS ROLE YOU WILL:

 - Own Partiful's financial model - build it, maintain it, and make it the thing leadership actually uses to make decisions

 - Scenario model for our most important decisions - hiring, fundraising, expansion, monetization efforts

 - Own pricing strategies & build the unit economics for Partiful’s monetization efforts

 - Manage the financial side of ticketing deals - diligencing partners, modeling fee discounts & sponsorship ROI and building guardrails to mitigate risk

 - Coordinate with our external accounting and tax firms to keep the close tight, the books clean, and the numbers trustworthy

 - Own controls, policies & finance process design end-to-end

 - Drive cost reduction across the business - identifying opportunities and actioning them, not just flagging them

 - Build and own the company's budget infra

source_jobs.title: Strategic Accounts Lead
source_jobs.description:
PARTIFUL'S MISSION IS TO CULTIVATE FRIENDSHIPS THROUGH SOCIAL EVENTS.

We believe events are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

We just launched Partiful Ticketing, the first major plank of our monetization strategy. We're hiring a Strategic Accounts Lead to own the highest-revenue side of the ticketing business. Your mandate is simple: bring on the hosts whose events define culture, and drive our most impactful tranche of ticket sales through the relationships you own (and new ones you build).

You'll be selling to Partiful’s most strategic accounts based both on revenue and influence. This is a sales role; closing high-value deals is the job. But importantly, you’ll be focused on curating and closing the most culturally relevant events of the year, closing organizers who treat platform choice as a signal about the community they are building.




IN THIS ROLE, YOU WILL:

 - Own our largest book of attributable ticket sales in your first year, building the pipeline, sales motion, and account plan from scratch

 - Source and close headliner deals: artists, performers, and cultural figures whose events on Partiful pull the next wave of hosts onto the platform

 - Build and run a target list of strategic accounts across venues, recurring event series, curated markets/fairs, and institutional cultural programs

 - Negotiate deal structures that unlock the right relationships, coordinating closely with our finance, legal, and product engineering teams

 - Develop the playbook for moving deals into recurring host relationships and peer referrals

 - Partner with marketing to refine our ICPs and tell the story of our highest-profile event

source_jobs.description:
PARTIFUL'S MISSION IS TO CULTIVATE FRIENDSHIPS THROUGH SOCIAL EVENTS.

We believe events are the most effective way to meet new people and make friends. Our product helps you throw incredible events, starting with memorable party pages that make it easy to plan & communicate with guests — download the app http://partiful.com/download to see how it works!

We're building new ways to streamline planning, connect meaningfully in the real world, and make connections between friends-of-friends. Our ultimate vision is to power everything you do in-person with your friends, eliminating the friction of bringing your most memorable experiences to life. You can read more about our mission in The Washington Post https://www.washingtonpost.com/technology/2023/12/31/partiful-gen-z-new-years-eve/, The New York Times https://www.nytimes.com/2022/09/15/style/partiful-event-planning-parties.html, The Wall Street Journal https://www.wsj.com/articles/evites-are-out-this-new-text-message-party-planner-is-in-46e8b64f, The Atlantic https://www.theatlantic.com/technology/archive/2022/12/party-invitation-website-partiful/672333/, Wirecutter https://www.nytimes.com/wirecutter/reviews/partiful-app-review/, and USA Today https://www.usatoday.com/story/tech/news/2024/08/04/partiful-app-party-planning/72619936007/?taid=66af5128983783000189ad12&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter. Partiful was named Google’s Best App of 2024 https://blog.google/products/google-play/google-play-best-apps-games-2024/, a Finalist for Apple’s App Store Awards https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2024/11/apple-reveals-45-app-and-game-finalists-for-the-2024-app-store-awards/, and Apple’s App of the Day https://apps.apple.com/us/story/id1771691398 (awarded 4x). In 2025, we were named one of TIME's 100 Most Influential Companies https://time.com/collections/time100-companies-2025/7289589/partiful/, one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies https://www.fastcompany.com/91270177/social-media-most-innovative-companies-2025-duolingo-bluesky-boston-celtics-pinterest-partiful-planoly-sesame-workshop-feeld-strava-yelp, and named to Inc. Magazine's Best in Business List https://www.inc.com/john-jannuzzi/how-partiful-became-the-life-of-gen-zs-irl-party/91263552.

Our company is backed by top-tier investors including Andreessen Horowitz and Google Ventures, and advised by the founders of some of the most successful consumer social products ever made.




THE ROLE

We’re looking for a Head of Engineering to build and lead a high-performing engineering org that can ship ambitious product outcomes with speed, quality, and accountability as we scale.

You’ll own the health, output, and growth of the engineering team — making sure the right people are in the right roles, the management layer is strong, and recruiting, culture, and execution all reinforce each other. This is not a “headcount first” role: you should be obsessed with motivating and getting maximum leverage out of the current team and be willing to make hard calls when needed. You set the pace by example — willing to dive into the work, do what it takes during critical moments, and hold the bar high for yourself and the team.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and lead a high-performing engineering organization that can ship ambitious product and infra work with speed, quality, and accountability

 - Partner closely with the CTO on technical strategy, architecture, and roadmap prioritization; balance short-term product goals with long-term scalability and reliability

 - Partner closely with the CEO & CTO to communicate company vision and strategy, ensuring the entire engineering team is highly motivated to achieve ambitious goals

 - Own engineering execution and deadlines: ensure every project has clear goals, scope, owner, and deadlines — and that they’re consistently hit

 - Introduce lightweight, effective systems for ownership, accountability, and visibility (planning, status, reviews) without weighing the tea

notes: Partiful is a social events platform with a strong engineering focus.
